name: com.gameframex.unity.setting
description:
GameFrameX Setting — Unity persistent game settings package. Provides typed key-value storage (bool, int, float, string, serializable objects) with pluggable storage backends (defaulting to Unity PlayerPrefs), supporting load/save lifecycle, existence checks, and bulk removal. Docs: https://gameframex.doc.alianblank.com

GameFrameX Setting — Unity 持久化游戏设置功能包。提供类型化键值存储（bool、int、float、string、可序列化对象），支持可插拔存储后端（默认使用 Unity PlayerPrefs），提供加载/保存生命周期、存在性检查和批量删除。文档：https://gameframex.doc.alianblank.com
